content.text: Found it — it's named `lab-fleet-ollama-update-prompt.md` (created after my initial `ls`). Let me stop the filesystem search and read it.

result.output:
1	# Claude Code task: persist ollama helm values in lab-fleet
2	
3	Paste everything below this line into a Claude Code session started in `~/Developer/lab-fleet`.
4	
5	---
6	
7	Update the ollama config in this repo to match the live cluster state after the 2026-07-16 upgrade (chart 1.60.0 → 1.67.0, app 0.30.6 → 0.32.0, `OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL` 1 → 2). Make exactly the changes below, then commit and push. This repo has entire.io enabled — commit normally so the session checkpoint attaches.
8	
9	## 1. Replace `04-ollama/values.yaml` with exactly:
10	
11	```yaml
12	extraEnv:
13	- name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
14	  value: GPU-a69c6398-0353-3234-9f35-af0e02865f33
15	- name: NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES
16	  value: compute,utility
17	- name: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE
18	  value: 5m
19	- name: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL
20	  value: "2"
21	- name: OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION
22	  value: "1"
23	- name: OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE
24	  value: q8_0
25	ollama:
26	  gpu:
27	    enabled: true
28	    number: 1
29	    type: nvidia
30	  models:
31	    pull:
32	    - llama3.1
33	    - nomic-embed-text
34	persistentVolume:
35	  enabled: true
36	  size: 100Gi
37	  storageClass: longhorn
38	runtimeClassName: nvidia
39	service:
40	  loadBalancerIP: 192.168.7.153
41	  port: 11434
42	  type: LoadBalancer
43	tolerations:
44	- effect: NoSchedule
45	  key: nvidia.com/gpu
46	  operator: Exists
47	```
48	
49	Changes vs. current file: `OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL` "1" → "2"; removed the `OLLAMA_HOST: 0.0.0.0` entry (redundant — the chart handles binding; the live pod runs without it); added the tolerations block (matches the deployed release).
50	
51	## 2. In `04-ollama/README.md`:
52	
53	- Change the helm repo URL `https://otwld.github.io/ollama-helm/` to `https://helm.otwld.com/` (otwld migrated registries)
54	- In the install command, add `--version 1.67.0` after `ollama-helm/ollama`
55	- Change `` `OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1` `` to `` `OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=2` (2 concurrent requests per loaded model) ``
56	
57	## 3. Commit and push
58	
59	Commit message:
60	
61	```
62	04-ollama: bump to chart 1.67.0 (app 0.32.0), OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=2
63	
64	Matches live release after 2026-07-16 upgrade: 2 concurrent requests per
65	loaded model, redundant OLLAMA_HOST dropped (chart handles binding),
66	explicit nvidia.com/gpu toleration, helm repo URL updated to
67	helm.otwld.com with version pin.
68	```
69	
70	Push to `origin main`. Do not modify `.entire/` or hook files — they stay as committed.
71	
72	## Context (no action needed)
73	
74	The cluster is already running this config — release `ollama` in ns `ai` was upgraded via helm on 2026-07-16 and verified (pod Ready, API at 192.168.7.153:11434, NUM_PARALLEL=2 in pod env). This commit only brings the repo in line with reality.
75

1	# 04 — Ollama (otwld/ollama-helm)
2	
3	    helm repo add ollama-helm https://otwld.github.io/ollama-helm/
4	    helm upgrade --install ollama ollama-helm/ollama -n ai --create-namespace -f values.yaml
5	
6	Key choices: V100 pinned by GPU UUID; flash attention + q8_0 KV cache to fit
7	larger contexts in 16 GB VRAM; `OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1`; LoadBalancer at

9	Xcode instance) reach it directly. 100Gi Longhorn PV for models.

content.text: Both files match the prompt's expectations. Now applying the changes.

input.content:
extraEnv:
- name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
  value: GPU-a69c6398-0353-3234-9f35-af0e02865f33
- name: NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES
  value: compute,utility
- name: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE
  value: 5m
- name: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL
  value: "2"
- name: OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION
  value: "1"
- name: OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE
  value: q8_0
ollama:
  gpu:
    enabled: true
    number: 1
    type: nvidia
  models:
    pull:
    - llama3.1
    - nomic-embed-text
persistentVolume:
  enabled: true
  size: 100Gi
  storageClass: longhorn
runtimeClassName: nvidia
service:
  loadBalancerIP: 192.168.7.153
  port: 11434
  type: LoadBalancer
tolerations:
- effect: NoSchedule
  key: nvidia.com/gpu
  operator: Exists

input.command:
git add 04-ollama/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
04-ollama: bump to chart 1.67.0 (app 0.32.0), OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=2

Matches live release after 2026-07-16 upgrade: 2 concurrent requests per
loaded model, redundant OLLAMA_HOST dropped (chart handles binding),
explicit nvidia.com/gpu toleration, helm repo URL updated to
helm.otwld.com with version pin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
